summary: Successfully created the Pending Decisions Store with SQLite database, Python CLI script, and schema file. All required functionality implemented and tested.
notes: Database created with proper schema including constraints and indexes. All CLI commands tested successfully. Cross-conversation access enabled through decision IDs. Priority escalation logic built into expiration times. JSON context structure validated with escalation chain support.
learnings: SQLite constraint checks ensure data integrity for priority and status fields
JSON context structure supports complex decision scenarios with options, recommendations, and confidence scores
Cross-conversation audit trail maintained through resolved_by field
SMS-friendly summary field limited to 160 characters for mobile notifications
